title: Q-Inventory Randomizer
description: Scramble your inventory as time passes
body:
With this mod, you can make your inventory either reset or completely randomize after a set amount of time, defaulting to 1 minute.

Do /InventoryClearerStart to start the randomizer. It by default has the randomizer on.
Do /InventoryClearerEnd to stop it.
Do /InventoryClearerSecondDelay _seconds_ to change the reset time, in seconds.
Do /InventoryRandomizerMode and either _On_ or _Off_ (_True_ or _False_) to turn the randomizer aspect on or off. If it is off, then it just clears your inventory after the amount of time has passed.

The mod usually warns you five seconds before your inventory gets cleared or randomized.

/InventoryClearerWarning On/Off, which enables/disables the 5 second warning.
/InventoryRandomizerUnlimitedStacks On/Off, which allows stacks to go as high as the integer limit.
